MOTION TO STAY PROCEEDINGS
Off Calendar Feb-06-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT FIBROGEN, INC. AND ELIAS KOUCHAKJI'S MOTION TO STAY PROCEEDINGS is OFF CALENDAR. Duplicate entry. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Proceedings Pending Determination Of Appeal
Off Calendar Feb-06-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS FIBROGEN, INC. AND ELIAS KOUCHAKJI'S Motion To Stay Proceedings Pending Determination Of Appeal is GRANTED. Plaintiff Joanne Imperial filed a notice of non-opposition. The case is stayed, including discovery, pending the outcome of the appeal.

ORDER SIGNED after hearing. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-28-2017 Continued To May-16-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Arbitration And For Stay
Off Calendar Dec-13-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Christopher R. LeClerc of the law offices of LeClerc & LeClerc LLP (415-445-0900) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Linda M. Moroney of the law offices of Gordon & Rees (415-986-5900) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS FIBROGEN, INC. and ELIAS KOUCHAKJI's Motion For Order Compelling Arbitration And For Stay is DENIED. See tentative ruling and written order for findings and details. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court shares the basis for contract interpretation. Defendant argues arbitrability, procedural and substantial unconscionability. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT FIBROGEN, INC., ELIAS KOUCHAKJI'S Motion For Order Compelling Arbitration And For Stay is Denied in Part. (See tentative ruling for full details). The Court requires supplemental briefing limited to the 3 issues: 1)who determines the construction of the arbitration language 2)evidence of unequal bargaining positions 3) case law on severing language (as fully stated in the Reporter's notes and trancript). Moving party supplemental Brief - filed by 11/16/17, Supplemental Opposition - 12/7/17, Courtesy Copies to the Dept. when papers are filed. Hearing -12/13/17 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript).

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.
